summary: Reviewed this tick's two new modules — page-nav.js (TASK-303) and metadata.js (TASK-304), both VERIFIED. Both clean: metadata.js inserts every PDF-supplied value (Title/Author/Subject/Keywords/Creator/Producer/dates/version) via textContent into createElement'd <dt>/<dd>, PDF date strings parsed with regex+Date (no eval), innerHTML used only to clear; page-nav.js parses the go-to-page field with parseInt and clamps into [1,numPages] before its only querySelector, so no selector/CSS injection and no out-of-bounds. No eval/Function/document.write/insertAdjacentHTML anywhere. Infra clean: nginx -t ok, full resource CSP + nosniff/X-Frame-Options/Referrer-Policy all live, sensitive paths (.md/.sh/.git/dotfiles) 403, 0 failed SSH auth in 24h, no secrets in git, HTTP-only :80 (TLS deferred to DNS cutover). One finding remains OPEN: SEC-002 (viewer.js renderAll has no page-count cap — PDF-bomb/memory DoS gap on the 1.6 GiB box); re-confirmed present this tick (loadDocument/renderAll still loop 1..numPages uncapped). Flagged for developer per review-don't-rewrite.

findings.title: viewer.js renderAll() has no page-count cap (PDF-bomb / memory-exhaustion gap)
findings.reason: upload.js bounds file size (50 MB) and validates magic bytes, but viewer.js loadDocument()/renderAll() render every page into its own canvas with no limit. A crafted high-page-count PDF under 50 MB can exhaust memory on the 1.6 GiB box. Client-side only — affects only the uploader's own tab, no server impact. Violates the security-guide 'max 1000 pages' rule. Re-confirmed present 2026-06-07T20:25Z: viewer.js line ~37 getDocument then line ~53 loops pageNum 1..pdfDoc.numPages with no guard.
findings.next_action: Developer: in viewer.js loadDocument() after getDocument().promise resolves, reject/warn when doc.numPages > 1000 (or render lazily/windowed). Already documented in docs/security-guide.md (KNOWN GAP block). Not implemented by security per review-don't-rewrite.

code_review.metadata_xss: all PDF info values via textContent on createElement'd <dt>/<dd>; innerHTML only used to clear ('') — OK
code_review.pagenav_input_handling: go-to-page parsed via parseInt + clamped to [1,numPages] before the single data-page-number querySelector; non-numeric reverts; no out-of-bounds scroll, no selector injection — OK
code_review.upload_validation: magic-bytes + MIME + .pdf extension + empty-check + 50MB limit + filename sanitize — OK (unchanged)
code_review.xss_sinks: all innerHTML occurrences (toc.js/metadata.js/viewer.js) are = '' clears; no eval/Function/document.write/insertAdjacentHTML — OK

headers_live: Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' blob: data:; worker-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' blob:; frame-ancestors 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'
tls: none (HTTP-only on :80; certbot deferred until cronloop.techtools.cz DNS cutover)
